title: rhinanthus serotinus
intro: Rhinanthus serotinus, also known as the late-flowering or summer-rhodiola, is a species of flowering plant in the family Orobanchaceae. This parasitic plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Rhinanthus serotinus include its potential to reduce stress, improve mood, and boost the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy for anxiety and depression. Rhinanthus serotinus can be prepared for medicinal use through various herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are typically made from the plant's leaves and flowers.
